defaults: Treat Temper as the operating layer for this repo.
Fetch doctrine and routing before major design or release guidance.
Use ship lite for narrow implementation confidence.
Use ship full for player-facing, infra, economy, security, or multi-system work.

capabilities.when: before designing a new system, feature, or data model — run this first, not after
capabilities.command: pnpm exec temper coach --cwd . --json --intent "<what you're designing>"
capabilities.result: fetch doctrine and routing before you answer

capabilities.when: after the first working version of a feature is done — before moving to the next thing
capabilities.command: pnpm exec temper ship lite --cwd . --intent "<what you just built>"
capabilities.result: run the default low-risk ship path

capabilities.when: before sharing with anyone, or when touching player-facing, economy, or multi-system code
capabilities.result: run the deeper blessed ship path and surface any gated follow-ups

capabilities.when: something is broken in a live environment and you need a recovery plan
capabilities.command: pnpm exec temper hotfix --cwd . --json --env prod --intent "<what broke>"
capabilities.result: route the response through the hotfix doctrine surface

capabilities.when: ending a session, switching to a different workstream, or handing work to another agent
capabilities.result: write a canonical restart artifact and update SESSION.md

confirmation_rules: Live-stateful steps start gated and require explicit `--promote <step>` to run.

notes: lite blessed default stays local-first: build, test, release_notes
full blessed default stays local-first: build, typecheck, test, balance_verify, release_notes
full gated steps require explicit promotion: smoke
smoke: Depends on environment credentials or mutates a shared runtime surface.

token_strategy: Read SESSION.md first for the active board.
Read the relevant HANDOFF_<slug>.md for restart detail.
Keep the session board short and push detail into handoffs.

workflow_memory.release_pattern: beta environment is modeled; prod environment is modeled; 5 GitHub workflow files detected
recurring_failure_modes: Root `test` currently resolves to lint-style validation rather than a real test or verify path.
deep verification has shared-state steps that should stay promoted, not default: smoke
recent_signals: 2431 local commits available for pattern inference
recent commit mix fix:8, chore:2, docs:2

resurfacing.message: Keep full-flow live verification explicit. Promote only when needed: smoke.
Do not read root `test` as real release confidence until the repo splits lint from verification.
Keep AGENTS, SESSION, and handoff surfaces current so restart cost does not creep back in.

Recurring failure modes to keep visible: Root `test` currently resolves to lint-style validation rather than a real test or verify path.; deep verification has shared-state steps that should stay promoted, not default: smoke
